headlines.description: Arsenal rode goals from Eddie Nketiah and Rob Holding to a straightforward Europa League win over Bodo/Glimt at the Emirates on Thursday night.

headlines.description: Bukayo Saka scored the game's only goal as Arsenal beat Bodo/Glimt 1-0 on Thursday to maintain their perfect start to Europa League group play.

headlines.description: Arsenal secured their spot in the Europa League knockout stage with two games to spare after beating PSV Eindhoven 1-0 at the Emirates Stadium.

headlines.description: Arsenal missed out on a chance to clinch direct progress to the Europa League last 16 after they went down 2-0 to PSV Eindhoven.

headlines.description: PSV Eindhoven beat Sevilla 2-0 in the second leg of their Europa League knockout stage, but the LaLiga side still advanced 3-2 on aggregate.

headlines.description: Mats Wieffer scored a second-half goal as hosts Feyenoord beat Roma 1-0 in the first leg of their Europa League quarterfinal in Rotterdam.
headlines.shortLinkText: Feyenoord beat Roma in UEL quarterfinal first leg

headlines.description: Juventus took a small step towards the last four of the Europa League as Federico Gatti's goal in the second half secured a 1-0 win over Sporting.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Gatti goal secures Juve win over Sporting

headlines.description: Manchester United were stunned by two late own goals as Sevilla claimed a 2-2 draw in the first leg of their Europa League quarterfinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man Utd stunned by 2 late OGs in Sevilla draw

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 4-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: AS Roma booked a spot in the Europa League semifinals after defeating Dutch side Feyenoord Rotterdam 4-1 on Thursday for a 4-2 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dybala nets huge goal as Roma move on in UEL

headlines.description: Sevilla sent Manchester United crashing out of the Europa League thanks to an emphatic 3-0 win in Thursday's quarterfinal second leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla thrash woeful Man Utd to reach UEL semis

headlines.description: Juventus drew 1-1 with Sporting in an entertaining Europa League clash on Thursday to win their quarterfinal 2-1 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve move past Sporting to Europa League semis

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 5-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 5-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen eased into the Europa League semifinals after crushing hosts Union Saint-Gilloise 4-1 on Thursday to win 5-2 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen crush Union to reach UEL semifinals

headlines.description: AS Roma grabbed a 1-0 home victory over Bayer Leverkusen in their Europa League semifinal first leg thanks to Edoardo Bove's second-half goal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma edge Leverkusen in 1st leg of UEL semi

headlines.description: Federico Gatti scored with a header seven minutes into added time to earn Juventus a 1-1 home draw against Sevilla in their Europa League semifinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Juve stun Europa 'kings' Sevilla with late goal

notes.text: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 1-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - AS Roma advance 1-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: AS Roma earned a 0-0 draw at Bayer Leverkusen in their Europa League semi-final return leg on Thursday to reach the final with a 1-0 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roma hold on to reach back-to-back Euro finals

headlines.description: Europa League thoroughbreds Sevilla fought back to reach yet another final as substitute Erik Lamela scored with a fabulous header five minutes into extra time to earn a gritty 2-1 win over Juventus on Thursday, securing a 3-2 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamela heads Sevilla past Juve into UEL final

headlines.description: Sevilla beat AS Roma 4-1 on penalties Wednesday to win the Europa League for a record-extending seventh time, handing Jose Mourinho his first defeat in six European finals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla beat Roma in shootout for 7th UEL title
